## Description

Brief description of changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project conventions
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors
- [ ] Self-reviewed the code
- [ ] Updated documentation if needed
- [ ] No new security vulnerabilities introduced
